title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (during Update all)
scenario: "Update All" 1-step DFU shows Houston screen when Charge Case is updating and both earbuds are placed in the case on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure Osprey (Voyager Free 60+) earbuds are connected to the app.
3. Place both earbuds into the Charge Case (CC).
4. Navigate to the Home screen and locate the 'Update All' option for a 1-step Device Firmware Update (DFU).
5. Tap 'Update All' to initiate the firmware update process.
6. Observe the app screen while the Charge Case (CC) firmware is being updated.
expected: The app should display the normal firmware update progress screen (e.g., progress bar, status text) while the Charge Case is being updated.
